narrative.text: Ayden Barnes struck out looking (1-2 BSFFFFFK).
Easton Field walked (3-0 BBBB).
Jacadien Simmons hit by pitch (3-0 BBBH); Easton Field advanced to second.
Rilee Starkey singled to cf (1-1 BF); Jacadien Simmons out at second cf to 2b; Easton Field advanced to third.
Kayden Gaines struck out swinging (0-2 SSS).
Grayson Whitfield walked (3-0 BBBB).
Levi Hudson doubled to cf (1-2 BFFF); Grayson Whitfield advanced to third.
Brady Hood homered to left center, 3 RBI (1-0 B); Levi Hudson scored; Grayson Whitfield scored.
Maddox Treadaway grounded out to cf.
Tripp Dye pinch hit for Landon Carroll.
Tripp Dye grounded out to 1b unassisted.
Jackson Hogue reached first on a throwing error by 3b (1-2 BFF).
Luke Elder reached first on a fielding error by 3b; Jackson Hogue advanced to second.
Heath Wilkinson pinch ran for Luke Elder.
Chase Johnson flied out to rf.
Tripp Dye to 3b.
Luke Elder to lf for Heath Wilkinson.
Chance Robinson popped up to 2b (1-0 B).
Ayden Barnes to rf.
Easton Field to cf.
Jacadien Simmons to lf.
Rilee Starkey to ss.
Kayden Gaines to 3b.
Chance Robinson to 2b.
Bennett Geno to c.
Judd Fraiser to p.
Maddox Burns to dh.
Paxton Moore to 1b.
Paxton Moore fouled out to rf (0-2 FF).
Bennett Geno popped up to 1b (1-0 B).
Evan Kennedy struck out, reached first on a wild pitch (1-1 BF).
Grayson Whitfield struck out, advanced to first on a passed ball; Evan Kennedy advanced to second.
Levi Hudson struck out, reached first on an error by c; Grayson Whitfield advanced to second; Evan Kennedy advanced to third.
Brady Hood tripled down the rf line, 3 RBI; Levi Hudson scored, unearned; Grayson Whitfield scored; Evan Kennedy scored.
Maddox Treadaway was intentionally walked (3-0 BBBB).
Tripp Dye reached on a fielder's choice Maddox Treadaway out at second 2b to ss.
Jackson Hogue out at first p to 2b, SAC Tripp Dye advanced to second.
Luke Elder flied out to rf, sacrifice fly Brady Hood scored.
Judd Fraiser singled.
Ayden Barnes grounded into double play ss to 2b to 1b; Judd Fraiser out on the play.
Easton Field singled.
Easton Field stole second
Easton Field out at third c to 2b, caught stealing
Dropped foul ball, E9.
Chase Johnson singled.
Evan Kennedy singled, advanced to second on the throw Chase Johnson advanced to second, out at second lf to c.
Grayson Whitfield singled.
Levi Hudson hit into double play 3b to 2b to 1b; Grayson Whitfield out on the play.
Jacadien Simmons singled.
Rilee Starkey singled Jacadien Simmons advanced to second.
Kayden Gaines hit into triple play 3b to 2b to 1b; Rilee Starkey out on the play Jacadien Simmons out on the play.
Dropped foul ball, E9.
Brady Hood singled.
Brady Hood advanced to second on an error by 2b, assist by p.
Maddox Treadaway flied out to rf, sacrifice fly (2-2 BBKK); Brady Hood advanced to third.
Tripp Dye reached first on a fielding error by 3b, advanced to second (0-2 FFF); Brady Hood scored on an error by 3b, unearned.
Jackson Hogue lined out to ss.
Luke Elder reached on catcher's interference.
Chase Johnson out on batter's interference.
Chance Robinson reached first on an error by 1b, assist by ss.
Chance Robinson stole second, advanced to third on an error by c
Paxton Moore struck out Chance Robinson caught stealing c to 2b, double play.
Paxton Moore placed on second.
Batter set to Jacadien Simmons.
